title: More of the Good Stuff Please
excerpt: Ahh - sorry for the radio silence here on the blog. My intention was to post while in Japan last week, but it was a doozy. For a number of reasons, obviously one being election day while out of the…
body:
Ahh - sorry for the radio silence here on the blog. My intention was to post while in Japan last week, but it was a doozy. For a number of reasons, obviously one being election day while out of the country. It was a huge range of emotions while we were traveling by train to Kyoto. Sometimes having access to social media at your fingertips isn't a good thing. Usually I don't have my phone turned on while out of the country, but Sprint has an amazing $5 flat rate plan, so I went with it.

We had a great time while on our trip and I posted a few Instagrams, but I even fell behind on editing photos and getting to those. Now that I am back and trying to recover from jetlag, I thought I would quickly share what I wrote on my  iPad Pro.  Still loving the Apple pencil with the Procreate app.
